purpose: Govern cumulative lesson mining from old chat transcripts without allowing stale, vague, or weaker practices to overwrite current MetaBlooms behavior.
authority_rule: Transcript-derived lessons are candidate evidence only. They may influence routing or ledger state only after a better-than-current comparison passes and no hard regression flags are present.
required_import_steps: map candidate to reusable workflow class
compare candidate against current OS baseline
reject or defer candidates with hard regression flags or weak evidence
write import receipt and append-only candidate ledger event
output_contract: Importer emits candidates compatible with workflow_generalization_router_v1.py --candidate-json.
pc_addendum_policy: PC-derived transcript lessons may be adopted only as enhancement lanes unless they preserve the Android/ChatGPT sandbox primary path.
